DebugWarning: Please note you have debug mode turned on. It isn't recommended to leave this on unless you have a purpose for it.
cfg.debug_logging.name: Debug Logging
cfg.debug_logging.desc: Write verbose crafting diagnostics to the BepInEx console. Leave off for normal play.
cfg.auto_craft.name: Auto-Craft
cfg.auto_craft.desc: Master switch for turning hand crafts into queueable auto-crafts. Use the per-workbench toggles below to choose which benches get converted. If this is off, nothing is converted regardless of the child toggles.
cfg.cat_alchemy.name: Alchemy
cfg.cat_alchemy.desc: Auto-convert alchemy hand crafts at the alchemy workbench, mortar, and survey station.
cfg.cat_cooking.name: Cooking
cfg.cat_study.name: Study
cfg.cat_study.desc: Auto-convert study desks and book-writing table crafts.
cfg.cat_metalwork.name: Metalwork
cfg.cat_metalwork.desc: Auto-convert anvil, hammer station, and jewelry-bench crafts.
cfg.cat_morgue.name: Morgue
cfg.cat_morgue.desc: Auto-convert body-preparation, autopsy-table, and packing-table crafts.
cfg.cat_carpentry.name: Carpentry
cfg.cat_carpentry.desc: Auto-convert sawhorse, chopping spot, carpentry workbench, and beam-gantry crafts.
cfg.cat_sermons.name: Sermons
cfg.cat_sermons.desc: Auto-convert sermons at the church pulpit. Note: this removes the energy cost per sermon.
cfg.cat_printing.name: Printing
cfg.cat_printing.desc: Auto-convert printing press and paper-press crafts.
cfg.cat_winemaking.name: Winemaking
cfg.cat_pottery.name: Pottery
cfg.cat_misc.name: Misc
cfg.cat_misc.desc: Auto-convert any other hand crafts that do not fall into the categories above (for example new benches from a game update).
cfg.half_fire_requirements.name: Half Fire Requirements
cfg.half_fire_requirements.desc: Halve the amount of fuel fires need for their requirements, across every craft that uses fire.
cfg.half_research_point_outputs.name: Half Research Point Outputs
cfg.half_research_point_outputs.desc: Halves red/green/blue research-point outputs (blood, fat, skin, heart, intestine) on crafts this mod has converted from manual to auto. Vanilla auto-crafts are never touched. Turn this off if you want full yields on auto-crafted recipes.
cfg.auto_max_multi_quality_crafts.name: Auto Max Multi-Quality Crafts
cfg.auto_max_multi_quality_crafts.desc: Automatically choose the maximum craft amount for multi-quality crafts.
cfg.auto_max_normal_crafts.name: Auto Max Normal Crafts
cfg.auto_max_normal_crafts.desc: Automatically choose the maximum craft amount for normal crafts.
cfg.auto_select_highest_quality_recipe.d: Automatically pick the highest-quality recipe available.
cfg.auto_select_craft_button_with_contro: Auto Select Craft Button With Controller
Automatically focus the craft button when using a controller.
cfg.force_multi_craft.name: Force Multi Craft
cfg.force_multi_craft.desc: Make almost every craftable item queueable.
cfg.check_for_updates.name: Check for Updates
cfg.check_for_updates.desc: Show a notice on the main menu when a newer version of this mod is available on NexusMods. Click the notice to open the mod's page.
